message:
chore: Add perf.data to gitignore

Ignores Linux perf profiling artifacts (perf.data, perf.data.old)
which are generated during performance analysis sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,6 +16,8 @@ rustc-ice-*.txt
 *.snap.new
 sweep_*.png
 test_screenshot.png
+perf.data
+perf.data.old
 
 # macOS resource fork files
 ._*
